headline: Earnings Preview: LENZ Therapeutics, Inc. (LENZ) Q2 Earnings Expected to Decline
summary: LENZ Therapeutics, Inc. (LENZ) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.
